description_long: This is a stylized vinyl doll with a large, rounded head and small body, featuring a matte black hairstyle that covers most of the head and frames the face. The doll has simple, cartoon-like facial features with round black eyes and a small dot for a nose, and no visible mouth. It is dressed in a black T-shirt with a white graphic print, black pants, and black shoes with white stripes. The doll's left wrist is adorned with a spiked bracelet, adding a punk or rock-inspired touch. The overall appearance is reminiscent of collectible pop culture figures, with exaggerated proportions and minimalistic detailing. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of vinyl toys.
description: A stylized vinyl doll with a large black hairstyle, black graphic T-shirt, black pants, and a spiked bracelet, featuring simple cartoon-like facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, black T-shirt with white graphic, spiked bracelet, and black shoes with white stripes.
description_view_1: Left rear view highlighting the smooth, rounded black hair and partial view of the spiked bracelet and shoes.
description_view_2: Back view dominated by the large, rounded black hair, with minimal body and clothing details visible.
description_view_3: Right rear view showing the spiked bracelet, black shoes, and the curvature of the hair.
attribute_clothing_style: Black graphic T-shirt with white print, black pants, and black shoes with white stripes, accessorized with a silver spiked bracelet; the style is reminiscent of punk or rock fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides, legs together, and head facing forward; the posture is static and balanced.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with round black eyes, no visible mouth, and no eyebrows, giving a blank or expressionless look.
attribute_hair_style: Large, matte black, helmet-like hairstyle that is straight and covers the sides and back of the head.
